product_overview: Cloud Global SL is a corporate website for a cloud services and technology company. It presents the company’s offerings and supports a professional, trustworthy browsing experience with multilingual content and visual customization.
core_goals: Explore the company’s services and technology offerings
Navigate through the site’s main informational sections
Switch the website language between Spanish, English, and French
Toggle between light and dark visual themes

features.name: Page Navigation
features.description: Allows visitors to move between the site’s main informational sections within the single-page website.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click a navigation link in the header -> View the selected section of the page
Navigate to / -> Click different navigation links in the header -> Move between sections such as Home, Subscriptions, Hosting, and Products

features.name: Theme Toggling
features.description: Lets visitors change the site appearance between light and dark themes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click the theme toggle pill button -> See the interface colors change
Navigate to / -> Click the theme toggle pill button again -> See the interface return to the previous theme

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Lets visitors change the website text among Spanish, English, and French.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the language selector -> Select a different language -> See the UI text update
Navigate to / -> Open the language selector -> Select another available language -> See the page content display in the newly chosen language

features.name: Page Navigation
features.description: Single-page application navigation between sections like Home, Subscriptions, Hosting, Products, etc.
user_interactions: View different sections of the page

features.name: Theme Toggling
features.description: Switch between light and dark themes

features.name: Language Switching
features.description: Switch website language between Spanish, English, and French
